qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated voice endpoint trust permits attacker-directed outbound WSS and UDP connections
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding reaches the same unauthenticated `/ws` control path that GHSA-xv8g-fj9h-6gmv fixes in `server/server/websocket.go`; its SSRF effect is a downstream consequence of issuing a privileged control message after that missing-auth session creation.

selected_finding.title: Unauthenticated voice endpoint trust permits attacker-directed outbound WSS and UDP connections

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The finding matches the advisory's missing-authentication root cause on `/ws`, but the copied PoC could not reach runnable activation evidence: the Docker rerun failed on containerd storage exhaustion and the host fallback failed on missing native `opusfile` and `dave` build dependencies before the vulnerable `/ws` flow came up.
evidence: Fix commit `0f9a00d9d549b16278db81fce6dfec350c2abc01` adds password checks to both `server/server/websocket.go` and `server/server/routes.go`, while its parent commit lacks those guards entirely.

The finding report ties exploitation to unauthenticated `GET /ws` session creation in `server/server/websocket.go` and then attacker-driven control messages, which is the same control-plane authentication gap described in the advisory.

/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_eeb7b1f3/.judge/poc_runs/voice_endpoint_ssrf/docker_build_failure.log shows the advisory-targeted Docker rerun failed before target start with `no space left on device` during containerd snapshot creation.

/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_eeb7b1f3/.judge/poc_runs/voice_endpoint_ssrf/run.log shows the host fallback cloned the pre-fix parent commit but failed before `/health` became reachable because Go could not build native `opusfile` and `dave` dependencies.
blockers_to_higher_tier: Copied Docker rerun could not build the target image because the local Docker/containerd storage was full.
Host fallback could not start the pre-fix server because required native libraries `opusfile` and `dave` were unavailable.

poc_executions.observed_effect: Image build aborted before the target started because Docker containerd could not allocate a new snapshot directory (`no space left on device`).
The host fallback cloned the pre-fix advisory parent commit, but the target never reached `/health` because `go run ./cmd/linkdave` stopped on missing native `opusfile` and `dave` dependencies.
